name: Sweet-Sour Franks C/p 4/93
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Hot dogs, or cocktail franks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a removable liner.
2. Mix well to break up any jelly chunks.
3. Place the liner in the base of the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes, until the jelly softens and the sauce ingredients blend together.
5. Cut the hot dogs into bite-sized pieces and add them to the slow cooker.
6. Add the pineapple chunks.
7. Cover and cook on high for 2 hours, or low for 4 hours.
8. Set the control to low to maintain temperature while serving.
